# Workspace Instructions

- Keep the portfolio dark-only and cinematic.
- Use the `app/` directory and keep each section in `components/`.
- Prefer placeholder content unless the user provides real copy or assets.
- Keep motion subtle but polished, and use Framer Motion variants for component animations.
- Use GSAP ScrollTrigger only for scroll-linked effects.
- Keep the code readable and consistent with the existing style.
